workflows.name: prepare-handoff
workflows.summary: Draft a handoff from the current branch or working tree with optional validation, blocker, risk, next-step, and evidence notes.

workflows.name: write-pr-rationale
workflows.summary: Draft reviewer-facing PR rationale from local branch context with optional why, validation, reviewer-note, risk, and evidence inputs.

workflows.name: capture-ci-investigation
workflows.summary: Wrapper-only beta workflow for bounded CI investigation summaries. Direct shared CLI generation is not implemented yet.
